texto: Did I mention how cute you look in my clothes?"Blushing I just look at what I'm wearing and laugh. "Chicks Dig me? And Sponge Bob boxers?""Chicks do dig me! And Sponge Bob is a great cartoon in your world.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sara Daniell que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “Did I mention how cute you look in my clothes?"Blushing I just look at what I'm wearing and laugh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, romance-funny, ya, com foco em romance-funny e ya.

frase_original: Did I mention how cute you look in my clothes?"Blushing I just look at what I'm wearing and laugh. "Chicks Dig me? And Sponge Bob boxers?""Chicks do dig me! And Sponge Bob is a great cartoon in your world.

texto: GET IN" he says, getting in on the driver side. I get in with no questions. Okay. This is a bad movie waiting to happen-I'm getting in a car with a guy I just met today who is keeping secrets from me. What the hell is wrong with me? I'm too scared to speak or ask or run away, though. So I just get in and put on my seat belt. I am so stupid.
